parameters.query: UPDATE "Log_Absen" SET "ID" = '{{ ($json.telegram_id).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', "Nama" = '{{ ($json.nama).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', "NIP" = '{{ ($json.nip).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', "Tanggal" = '{{ ($json.tanggal).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', "Jam" = '{{ ($json.jam).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', "Jenis Absen" = '{{ ($json.jenis_absen).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', "Ket" = '{{ ($json.keterangan).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', "instansi_id" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.instansi_id).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), (SELECT instansi_id FROM user_list WHERE "NIP" = '{{ ($json.nip).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}' LIMIT 1), (SELECT instansi_id FROM user_list WHERE id::text = '{{ ($json.telegram_id).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}' LIMIT 1), "Log_Absen".instansi_id, 'bapperida') WHERE "ID_Log" = '{{ ($json.ID_Log).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}' RETURNING *

ORDER BY "no" ASC NULLS LAST

UPDATE "user_list" SET "username" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.nama).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), "username"), "NIP" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.nip).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), "NIP"), "no" = COALESCE(NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ ($json.no).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), 'null')::numeric, "no"), "Jabatan" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.jabatan).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), "Jabatan"), "bidang" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.bidang).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), "bidang"), "Status" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.status).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), "Status"), "pangkat" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.pangkat).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), "pangkat"), "nomorhp" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.nomorhp).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), "nomorhp"), "role" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.role).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), "role"), "instansi_id" = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.instansi_id).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), "instansi_id"), "jam_masuk" = CASE WHEN {{ $json.hasOwnProperty('jam_masuk') }} THEN NULLIF('{{ ($json.jam_masuk || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '') ELSE "jam_masuk" END, "jam_pulang" = CASE WHEN {{ $json.hasOwnProperty('jam_pulang') }} THEN NULLIF('{{ ($json.jam_pulang || "").toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '') ELSE "jam_pulang" END WHERE "id" = '{{ ($json.id).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}' RETURNING *

INSERT INTO "Log_Absen" ("ID", "Nama", "NIP", "Tanggal", "Jam", "Jenis Absen", "Lokasi", "Ket", "koordinat", "instansi_id") VALUES ('{{ ($json.id).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}','{{ ($json.username).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}','{{ ($json.NIP).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}','{{ ($json.tanggal_input).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}','{{ ($json.jam_input).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}','{{ ($json.JenisAbsen).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}','{{ ($json.lok).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}','{{ ($json.ket).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}','{{ ($json.koordinat).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', COALESCE((SELECT instansi_id FROM user_list WHERE "NIP" = '{{ ($json.NIP).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}' LIMIT 1), (SELECT instansi_id FROM user_list WHERE id::text = '{{ ($json.id).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}' LIMIT 1), 'bapperida')) RETURNING *
UPDATE public.user_list SET "Status" = 'AKTIF' WHERE "NIP" = '{{ ($json.pegawai.nip).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AND "Status" IS DISTINCT FROM 'AKTIF';
SELECT * FROM instansi_list ORDER BY nama_instansi ASC
SELECT * FROM bidang_list WHERE instansi_id = '{{ ($json.query.instansi_id).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}' ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT "id", "username", "NIP", "Jabatan", "Status", "no", "bidang", "pangkat", "nomorhp", "role", "is_admin", "instansi_id"
FROM "user_list"
WHERE (UPPER("role") NOT IN ('USER') 
   OR "is_admin" = true 
   OR UPPER("Jabatan") LIKE '%KEPALA%' 
   OR UPPER("Jabatan") LIKE '%SEKRETARIS%' 
   OR UPPER("Jabatan") LIKE '%KABID%' 
   OR UPPER("Jabatan") LIKE '%IRBAN%'
   OR UPPER("Jabatan") LIKE '%INSPEKTUR%')
   AND instansi_id = '{{ ($json.query.instansi_id).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
ORDER BY "no" ASC NULLS LAST;

INSERT INTO statistik_pegawai (
    nip, 
    instansi_id, 
    total_masuk, 
    total_pulang, 
    total_terlambat, 
    total_lebih_awal,
    akum_menit_terlambat,
    akum_menit_lebih_awal,
    total_izin, 
    total_sakit, 
    total_tugas,
    total_tubel,
    total_cuti,
    total_alpa,
    updated_at
)
SELECT 
    '{{ ($json.payload.NIP || $json.payload.nip).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    COALESCE(
        (SELECT instansi_id FROM user_list WHERE "NIP" = '{{ ($json.payload.NIP || $json.payload.nip).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}' LIMIT 1),
        (SELECT instansi_id FROM user_list WHERE id::text = '{{ ($json.payload.ID || $json.payload.id || $json.payload.pegawai_id).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}' LIMIT 1),
        'bapperida'
    ),
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Jenis Absen" IN ('MASUK', 'DI LUAR JAM MASUK')),
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Jenis Absen" IN ('PULANG', 'DI LUAR JAM PULANG', 'PULANG LUAR')),
    
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
        WHERE "Jenis Absen" = 'DI LUAR JAM MASUK' 
        OR "Jenis Absen" = 'TANPA BERITA'
    ),
    
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
        WHERE "Jenis Absen" = 'DI LUAR JAM PULANG' 
    ),
    
    COALESCE(SUM(
        CASE 
            WHEN "Jenis Absen" = 'TANPA BERITA' THEN 450
            WHEN "Jenis Absen" = 'DI LUAR JAM MASUK'
            THEN GREATEST(0, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ("Jam"::time - (
                COALESCE((SELECT masuk::time FROM jam_periode WHERE "Log_Absen"."Tanggal"::date BETWEEN dari::date AND sampai::date LIMIT 1), '07:15:00'::time)
            ))) / 60)
            ELSE 0 
        END
    ), 0)::integer,

    COALESCE(SUM(
        CASE 
            WHEN "Jenis Absen" = 'DI LUAR JAM PULANG'
            THEN GREATEST(0, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
                COALESCE((SELECT pulang::time FROM jam_periode WHERE "Log_Absen"."Tanggal"::date BETWEEN dari::date AND sampai::date LIMIT 1), '14:30:00'::time)
                - "Jam"::time
            )) / 60)
            ELSE 0 
        END
    ), 0)::integer,

    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Jenis Absen" = 'IZIN'),
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Jenis Absen" = 'SAKIT'),
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Jenis Absen" IN ('TUGAS', 'DL')),
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Jenis Absen" = 'TUBEL'),
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Jenis Absen" = 'CUTI'),
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Jenis Absen" = 'TANPA BERITA'),
    NOW()
FROM "Log_Absen"
WHERE "NIP" = '{{ ($json.payload.NIP || $json.payload.nip).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
ON CONFLICT (nip) 
DO UPDATE SET 
    total_masuk = EXCLUDED.total_masuk,
    total_pulang = EXCLUDED.total_pulang,
    total_terlambat = EXCLUDED.total_terlambat,
    total_lebih_awal = EXCLUDED.total_lebih_awal,
    akum_menit_terlambat = EXCLUDED.akum_menit_terlambat,
    akum_menit_lebih_awal = EXCLUDED.akum_menit_lebih_awal,
    total_izin = EXCLUDED.total_izin,
    total_sakit = EXCLUDED.total_sakit,
    total_tugas = EXCLUDED.total_tugas,
    total_tubel = EXCLUDED.total_tubel,
    total_cuti = EXCLUDED.total_cuti,
    total_alpa = EXCLUDED.total_alpa,
    updated_at = NOW();
